title: Ores Are OP
description: Turn Minecraft ores into overpowered loot sources for fast and fun progression.
body:
The Minecraft Ores Are OP datapack makes mining ores far more rewarding. Breaking ore blocks such as coal, iron, gold, diamond, and emerald can now drop overpowered items, rare resources, or enchanted gear, transforming mining into an exciting and fast-paced progression system.

Perfect for survival worlds, multiplayer servers, or custom challenges, this datapack keeps vanilla mechanics intact while giving players a powerful incentive to explore and mine deeper. It’s designed to make resource gathering more thrilling and rewarding without breaking gameplay balance.

Features

All Minecraft ores drop OP items and rare loot

Includes enchanted tools, weapons, armor, and resources

Makes mining more rewarding and exciting

Boosts early- and mid-game progression

Compatible with vanilla Minecraft mechanics

Works in singleplayer and multiplayer
